name: Polynesian Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boned, Skinned Chicken (breasts cut into 1-inch pieces)
1 cup Diagonally Sliced Carrots (¼ inch thick)
8 oz Can of Sliced Water Chestnuts (drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with garlic powder.
2. Place the chicken in a 2-½ quart casserole dish coated with cooking spray.
3. Cover with plastic wrap, vented. Microwave at high power for 4-5 minutes, or until done.
4. Drain and set chicken aside.
5. Drain pineapple and set aside.
6. Combine 2 tablespoons of juice, carrots, and water chestnuts in the casserole dish. Cover and microwave at high power for 2 to 3 minutes.
7. Add pineapple and snow peas; cover and microwave at high power for 1 minute.
8. In a 2-cup glass measure, combine remaining pineapple juice, cornstarch, brown sugar, soy sauce, and vinegar. Stir well.
9. Microwave until thickened, about 1 minute.
10. Add chicken and sauce to the casserole; toss gently to coat.
11. Microwave uncovered at high power for 1 minute, or until thoroughly heated.
12. Serve chicken mixture over rice.
272 Calories per Chicken Breast and ½ cup Rice (Fat: 7.5g, Cholesterol: 143mg).
